programmes.show_description: Love beauty? Tune in to see our exciting array of popular and iconic brands plus cult products you're sure to love.
Celebrate female-led innovation with the Buy Women Built Edit. Discover inspiring brands and unique finds, all created by talented women entrepreneurs.
Tune in for an hour of volume-boosting haircare from trichologist brand Philip Kingsley, featuring targeted picks from the Density range to help promote the look of thickness and fullness.
Today's show focuses on NV Perricone skincare, specially formulated to tackle the signs of ageing.
Laura Geller is a renowned make-up artist, teacher and working mother and the creative force behind one of the most successful make-up studios in New York. Join us to explore her superb range.
Love beauty? Tune in to see the latest deals and bag a beauty bargain. We've got an exciting array of popular and iconic brands plus cult products you're sure to adore.
Get high performance results you want with Doll10: the pioneer in age reversal beauty and a combination of breakthrough technologies, age transforming complexes and real life make-up techniques.
Tune in to see Dyson's ground-breaking Supersonic hairdryer and Airwrap styling tool. Discover how quick and quiet drying or styling your hair can be with these intelligent tools.
Join us for this exciting beauty range developed by Dr Nassif. Discover products designed to boost your skin's natural radiance and appearance, delivering remarkable results.
Up your beauty game with our best finds in the industry, from favourite formulas to the latest releases. Whether you want to shake up your make-up or step up your skincare, find it here.
Care for your mind and body holistically and sensuously with therapeutic aromatherapy. Elemis are famed for their premier spa and salon treatments, and for the absolute purity of their plant oils.
Relax and unwind as we explore HoMedics latest massage range, designed to help you relieve any feeling of muscle tension and stiffness from the comfort of your own home.
Love beauty? Tune in to see the latest deals and bag a beauty bargain. We've got an exciting array of popular and iconic brands plus cult products you're sure to adore.
Find the best in health and fitness products to give you a spring in your step and a healthier lifestyle. From top tips and great gadgets, we'll help you to revitalise your daily routine.
SBC have captured the essences of plants to soothe your body. Tune in to find out how your skin can benefit from their renowned natural gel formulations.
Tune in to see a great selection of premium beauty from the big-name brands we sell at QVC.
Care for your mind and body holistically and sensuously with therapeutic aromatherapy. Elemis are famed for their premier spa and salon treatments, and for the absolute purity of their plant oils.
Up your beauty game with our best finds in the industry, from favourite formulas to the latest releases. Whether you want to shake up your make-up or step up your skincare, find it here.
Love beauty? Tune in to see the latest deals and bag a beauty bargain. We've got an exciting array of popular and iconic brands plus cult products you're sure to adore.
Professional beauty products from the pioneering skincare specialists. Gatineau combines the highest quality plant and marine extracts with the very latest cutting-edge biotechnology.
This show features a wide range of beauty products for your body, face, hair and nails, plus a selection of make-up. Plus our top beauty experts will be on hand to give you great advice and tips.
Care for your mind and body holistically and sensuously with therapeutic aromatherapy. Elemis are famed for their premier spa and salon treatments, and for the absolute purity of their plant oils.
In this show, explore an array of products from Neom Wellbeing, combining fabulous fragrances with naturally-sourced ingredients to offer you luxury aromatherapy products for the body, bath and home.
This Australian Bodycare range is inspired by the ancient traditions of the Aborigines who discovered the effects of natural ingredients. Find cleansing and caring products for your skin.
